title: Analysis settings
description: GitPulse separates data collection from interpretation when calculating signals.

filters.title: Repository scope
filters.description: Controls which repository content GitPulse should consider when reading Git history.
filters.excludedPathsHelp: Comma-separated paths to ignore when ranking changed files, for example: dist/, node_modules/, target/.
filters.defaultBranchHelp: Used as the preferred branch label for future branch-aware analysis. Current analysis reads the selected repository HEAD.

portable.title: Import and export
portable.description: Move GitPulse settings between machines or share them with a team.
portable.importFailed: Settings import failed. Check the JSON file and try again.
portable.messagePlaceholder: Settings stay local unless you export them.

repositoryMemory.title: Repository memory
repositoryMemory.description: Choose whether GitPulse should reopen the last repository after restart.

language.title: Language
language.description: Choose the language used in the app.

defaults.title: Signal defaults
defaults.description: Default criteria used for initial Git analysis.
defaults.bugKeywordsHelp: Comma-separated. Used to count fix overlap in Hotspots.
defaults.emergencyPatternsHelp: Use commas for aliases in one row, for example: revert, reverted. The row signal is shared by every alias.

cache.title: Cache and performance
cache.description: Analysis results are cached in memory while the app is running.
cache.localQueryCache: Using local query cache for this session.
